Interface LibraryBackend

All Known Implementing Classes:
CUDABackend, MulticoreAudioBackend, NativeCPULinearAlgebraBackend, NativeFFTProvider, OpenCLLinearAlgebraBackend
public interface LibraryBackend
Mixin interface for backends that load native libraries via JNI, Panama FFM, or other native interop mechanisms.

This is a capability interface, not a position in the ComputeBackend hierarchy. Any backend type (CPU, GPU, SIMD, etc.) can additionally implement NativeBackend to indicate it relies on native code.

Examples:

  • NativeBLASBackend implements ComputeBackend, NativeBackend — CPU BLAS via Panama FFM
  • CUDABackend implements GPUBackend, NativeBackend — CUDA via Panama FFM
  • OpenCLBackend implements GPUBackend, NativeBackend — OpenCL via Panama FFM

Since:
1.1
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default String
    getNativeLibraryName()
    Returns the name of the native library this backend depends on.
    boolean
    isLoaded()
    Checks if the native library is loaded and available.

  • Method Details

    • isLoaded

      boolean isLoaded()
      Checks if the native library is loaded and available.
      Returns:
      true if the native library has been successfully loaded

    • getNativeLibraryName

      default String getNativeLibraryName()
      Returns the name of the native library this backend depends on.
      Returns:
      library name (e.g., "openblas", "cuda", "fftw3")
